text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ryan! Have you had a chance to see the<n>game
from the other day?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Bottom of the ninth, two outs and all<n>bases
loaded! They were positively<n>cornered! Yet
somehow they pulled off<n>the most miraculous—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I most certainly will not! Just thinking<n>about that
moment makes me—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Stop, stop! Do you really wanna talk<n>about this where
people can hear you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
A-ahaha. Whatever do you mean? A<n>Mejiro would
never be having any<n>unrefined conversation...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me, I just received the<n>most
wonderful tea leaves. Why don't<n>we go have
some?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, so that's your cover, huh? All<n>right, let's
go have some tea!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Y-yes! Tea... That's all we're doing!
